algorithm_under_test: LEDH/PFPF-OT with streaming transport versus P = Q diag(1/g) R^T lazy low-rank resampling
nonclaims: no streaming superiority claim at unpaired large-N rows

run_manifest.command: /home/ubuntu/python/BayesFilter/docs/benchmarks/scalable_ot_low_rank_ledh_pfpf_efficiency.py --mode paired-gpu --internal-single-row --single-row-route low_rank --single-row-particle-count 100000 --routes low-rank --particle-counts 100000 --batch-size 1 --time-steps 2 --state-dim 8 --obs-dim 6 --rank 16 --assignment-epsilon 0.015625 --alpha 1e-08 --max-projection-iterations 240 --convergence-threshold 1e-06 --denominator-floor 1e-30 --sinkhorn-iterations 10 --sinkhorn-epsilon 0.5 --annealed-scaling 0.9 --annealed-convergence-threshold 0.001 --row-chunk-size 1024 --col-chunk-size 1024 --particle-chunk-size 256 --warmups 0 --repeats 1 --row-timeout-seconds 900 --dtype float32 --seed 20260621 --device /GPU:0 --device-scope visible --expect-device-kind gpu --tf32-mode enabled --trust-context trusted_gpu_required --phase-id paired-gpu:row:low_rank:N=100000 --phase-result-path docs/plans/bayesfilter-dpf-ledh-pfpf-ot-low-rank-efficiency-validation-p02-paired-gpu-result-2026-06-21.md --quiet --output docs/benchmarks/scalable-ot-low-rank-ledh-pfpf-efficiency-paired-gpu-2026-06-21-row-low_rank-n100000.json --markdown-output docs/benchmarks/scalable-ot-low-rank-ledh-pfpf-efficiency-paired-gpu-2026-06-21-row-low_rank-n100000.md --cuda-visible-devices 1
